subcodes.first_line: In this day the spiritual herald hath brought forth from the garden of inner meanings these words: "Whoso hath attained unto patience and steadfastness in all matters..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز پیک معنوی از حدیقه معانی این کلمه آورد من فاز بالصبر و الاصطبار فی موارد
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
